points.text: Mabion S.A. reactivated its MabionCD20 monoclonal antibody program through a collaboration with Oddifact SAS to advance the asset for rare disease indications, leveraging its status as a biosimilar to Rituxan.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics aligned with the FDA on submission plans for sonelokimab, a Nanobody® (single-domain antibody), for hidradenitis suppurativa, with BLA submission planned for end-September 2026.
MabionCD20, a CD20-targeting monoclonal antibody, has secured two FDA Orphan Drug Designations for membranous nephropathy and autoimmune hemolytic anemia to support its repositioning strategy.

MoonLake's sonelokimab Phase 3 VELA program reported Week 52 data in hidradenitis suppurativa, with the MIRA trial showing a ~43% HiSCR75 response and ~29 percentage point delta-to-placebo at Week 12.
Zenas BioPharma is advancing obexelimab, a bifunctional monoclonal antibody targeting CD19 and FcγRIIb to inhibit B cell activity in autoimmune diseases without depletion.
Connect Biopharma completed enrollment in the Phase 2 Seabreeze STAT asthma study evaluating rademikibart, a next-generation antibody targeting IL-4Rα for acute exacerbations.
Zenas BioPharma includes ZB014, a preclinical half-life extended anti-CD19 and FcγRIIb monoclonal antibody, in its earlier stage pipeline.
Connect Biopharma expects to report topline data from the Seabreeze STAT asthma study evaluating rademikibart in early September 2026.

Rezolute — Ersodetug (RZ358) — Congenital Hyperinsulinism — Presented top-line results from the global, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase 3 sunRIZE study at the Endocrine Society Annual Meeting; described as an insulin receptor modulating antibody.

Lundbeck's eptinezumab (Vyepti), a CGRP-targeted monoclonal antibody, demonstrated real-world improvements in cognitive symptoms (brain fog) after 12 months in migraine patients who failed prior CGRP therapies.

Genentech/Roche's astegolimab, a human IgG2 monoclonal antibody blocking ST2-mediated IL-33 activity, significantly reduced annualized moderate/severe exacerbation rates in COPD patients regardless of eosinophil count or smoking status.

Kyowa Kirin — Burosumab-twza (Crysvita) — X-linked hypophosphatemia — Monoclonal anti-fibroblast growth factor 23 antibody demonstrated superior improvements in pain, stiffness, and physical function over active vitamin D and phosphate salts in a 3-year prospective observational study (ENDO 2026).
Biogen — RayThera acquisition — Immunology pipeline — $1B deal to acquire undisclosed immune drug candidates, including one anti-inflammatory program expected to enter clinical trials in Q3 2026.
Sanofi — Sarclisa (isatuximab) — Multiple Myeloma — Subcutaneous formulation approved in Japan for patients with multiple myeloma.
Chugai Pharma's Avastin (bevacizumab), a monoclonal antibody, received approval in Japan for an additional indication.
Rituxan (rituximab), a monoclonal antibody, received approval in Japan for an additional dosage regimen against certain nephrotic syndrome.

Inovio Pharmaceuticals — AK117 (anti-CD47 monoclonal antibody) — Previously untreated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) — Phase 2 trial presented at EHA 2026 showed 80.0% overall response rate vs 66.7% placebo when combined with azacitidine/venetoclax.

Mabion S.A. — MabionCD20 — Rare Diseases (Membranous Nephropathy, Autoimmune Hemolytic Anemia) — Signed LoI with Oddifact SAS to reposition CD20 monoclonal antibody; asset holds two FDA Orphan Drug Designations and completed Phase III in original indications.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics — Sonelokimab — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Final pre-BLA meeting with FDA completed; BLA submission planned end-September 2026; label expected to include adolescent data from VELA-TEEN and Week 12 HiSCR75 of ~43%.

Zenas BioPharma — Obexelimab — Autoimmune diseases — Bifunctional monoclonal antibody binding CD19 and FcγRIIb to inhibit pathogenic B cells without depletion; lead candidate advancing in clinical stage.
Connect Biopharma — Rademikibart — Acute exacerbations in asthma — Phase 2 Seabreeze STAT study enrollment completed; topline data expected early September 2026.
Zenas BioPharma — ZB014 — Autoimmune diseases — Preclinical half-life extended anti-CD19 and FcγRIIb monoclonal antibody in development.

Rezolute — Ersodetug (RZ358) — Congenital Hyperinsulinism — Phase 3 sunRIZE study top-line results presented at Endocrine Society Annual Meeting; program includes compassionate use case series for malignant insulin-secreting tumors.

Lundbeck — Eptinezumab (Vyepti) — Migraine (episodic/chronic) — Real-world INFUSE study (n=190) showed cognitive symptom improvement after 12 months in patients with 1+ failed prior CGRP-targeted therapy; only IV-administered CGRP mAb.

Genentech/Roche — Astegolimab — COPD (frequent exacerbations) — Pooled analysis of Phase 2b ALIENTO and Phase 3 ARNASA trials (n=2,682) showed reduced moderate/severe exacerbation rates with 476 mg SC dose q2w/q4w vs placebo.

Kyowa Kirin — Burosumab-twza (Crysvita) — X-linked hypophosphatemia — Monoclonal anti-FGF23 antibody showed greater improvement in all three Western Ontario and McMaster Universities Osteoarthritis Index domains (pain, stiffness, physical function) vs standard care in 54 patients over 3 years.

Biogen — RayThera acquisition — Immunology — $1B total value deal (undisclosed upfront + milestones) to acquire portfolio of anti-inflammatory drug candidates, with one program targeting Q3 2026 clinical entry.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics — sonelokimab — Hidradenitis Suppurativa — Phase 3 VELA program Week 52 data released; FDA accepted MIRA trial data for substantial evidence of effectiveness; BLA submission targeted end of September 2026.
Sanofi — Sarclisa (isatuximab) — Multiple Myeloma — Subcutaneous formulation received regulatory approval in Japan.
Chugai Pharma — Avastin (bevacizumab) — Additional indication (Japan) — Regulatory approval granted for expanded use of the monoclonal antibody.
Rituxan (rituximab) — Nephrotic syndrome (Japan) — Regulatory approval granted for additional dosage regimen of the monoclonal antibody.

Inovio Pharmaceuticals — AK117 — Acute Myeloid Leukemia — Phase 2 data: 80.0% ORR (95% CI 61.4%-92.3%) vs 66.7% placebo; median OS not reached vs 8.3 months (HR 0.46); median DOR 10.4 months vs 5.6 months.

Mabion S.A. — Rare disease asset reactivation — MabionCD20 (CD20 monoclonal antibody) — Leveraging Phase III data and manufacturing expertise to pursue orphan indications via AI-driven platform partnership with Oddifact.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics — Commercialization of inflammatory therapies — Sonelokimab (Nanobody®) — $357.9M cash position as of Q1 2026; cash runway to end-2027; advancing BLA for HS and Phase 3 IZAR for Psoriatic Arthritis.

Zenas BioPharma — Clinical-stage autoimmune therapy development — Obexelimab (bifunctional mAb) + ZB014 (preclinical mAb) — Advancing two late-stage and preclinical monoclonal antibody programs targeting B cell lineage.

Connect Biopharma — Transforming care for inflammatory diseases — Rademikibart (anti-IL-4Rα antibody) — Phase 2 Seabreeze STAT asthma study fully enrolled; exclusive license granted to Simcere for Greater China with up to $110M in milestones.

Rezolute — Late-stage ultra-rare disease development — Ersodetug (RZ358) — Advancing insulin receptor modulating antibody program in congenital and tumor-induced hyperinsulinism; presented Phase 3 sunRIZE data and compassionate use outcomes at ENDO 2026.
Lundbeck — Advancing IV monoclonal antibody therapy for migraine — Eptinezumab (Vyepti) — Real-world data confirms efficacy in cognitive domains for patients failing oral or subcutaneous CGRP mAbs.

Genentech/Roche — Developing ST2/IL-33 pathway blockade for respiratory disease — Astegolimab (human IgG2 mAb) — Phase 3 ARNASA and Phase 2b ALIENTO pooled data supports benefit-risk profile in broad COPD population.

Kyowa Kirin — Monoclonal antibody commercialization — Burosumab-twza (Crysvita) — FDA-approved first-line therapy for X-linked hypophosphatemia; real-world data confirms long-term functional benefits over conventional phosphate/vitamin D therapy.
Biogen — Strategic immunology expansion — RayThera acquisition — $1B deal secures undisclosed anti-inflammatory pipeline; one candidate slated for Q3 2026 clinical initiation.

Sanofi — R&D leadership transition — Sarclisa (isatuximab) — Appointed Paulo Fontoura as Global Head of R&D Pharma effective September 1, 2026; advancing pipeline including approved subcutaneous Sarclisa in Japan.
Chugai Pharma — Monoclonal antibody portfolio expansion — Avastin (bevacizumab) — Secured additional indication approval in Japan.
Roche/Chugai — Monoclonal antibody lifecycle management — Rituxan (rituximab) — Secured additional dosage approval for nephrotic syndrome in Japan.
Inovio Pharmaceuticals — Advancing anti-CD47 monoclonal antibody pipeline — AK117 — Phase 2 trial in AML demonstrated durable remission and favorable survival trends with manageable safety profile.

MabionCD20 — Mechanism: CD20-targeting monoclonal antibody (biosimilar to Rituxan/MabThera) — Phase: Completed Phase III (original indication) — Population: Lymphoma/Rheumatoid Arthritis (historical) / Orphan indications (current focus) — Status: Repositioning for membranous nephropathy and autoimmune hemolytic anemia with FDA ODDs secured.

Sonelokimab — Mechanism: Nanobody® (single-domain antibody) targeting IL-17A and IL-17F — Phase: 3 (VELA, MIRA, VELA-TEEN) — Population: Hidradenitis Suppurativa (including adolescents ≥12 years) — Comparator: Placebo — Results: ~43% HiSCR75 response at Week 12; ~29 percentage point delta-to-placebo; Week 52 data released.

Obexelimab — Mechanism: Bifunctional binding to CD19 and FcγRIIb to inhibit B cell activity without depletion — Phase: Clinical — Population: Autoimmune disease patients — Outcome: Designed to address pathogenic B cell role via subcutaneous injection.

Rademikibart — Mechanism: Targeting IL-4Rα — Phase: 2 (Seabreeze STAT) — Population: Patients with acute exacerbations of asthma — Endpoint: Enrollment completed; topline data expected early September 2026.
ZB014 — Mechanism: Anti-CD19 and FcγRIIb binding with half-life extension — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Not specified — Status: Potentially best-in-class monoclonal antibody candidate.

Ersodetug (RZ358) — Mechanism: Insulin receptor modulating antibody — Phase: 3 (sunRIZE) — Population: Congenital hyperinsulinism — Comparator: Placebo — Results: Top-line data presented at Endocrine Society Annual Meeting; additional compassionate use case series reported for malignant insulin-secreting tumors.

Eptinezumab — Mechanism: CGRP receptor blockade — Phase: Real-world (INFUSE) — Population: Adults with chronic/episodic migraine failing 1+ prior CGRP therapy — Comparator: Historical/implicit prior therapy — Results: Improvement in brain fog and cognitive symptoms over 12 months.

Astegolimab — Mechanism: Human IgG2 monoclonal antibody blocking ST2-mediated IL-33 activity — Phase: 2b/3 (ALIENTO/ARNASA pooled) — Population: COPD patients with frequent exacerbations (n=2,682) — Comparator: Placebo — Results: Reduced annualized moderate/severe exacerbation rates independent of eosinophil count or smoking status.

Burosumab-twza — Mechanism: Monoclonal anti-fibroblast growth factor 23 antibody — Phase: Post-marketing observational — Population: X-linked hypophosphatemia (n=54) — Comparator: Active vitamin D + phosphate salts (n=55) — Results: Significant improvement in pain, stiffness, and physical function domains over 3 years.

Sarclisa (isatuximab) — Mechanism: Anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: Multiple Myeloma — Comparator: N/A (Approval status) — Results: Subcutaneous formulation approved in Japan.

Avastin (bevacizumab) — Mechanism: VEGF-A inhibition monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: Patients with newly indicated condition in Japan — Comparator: N/A — Results: Regulatory approval granted for additional indication.

Rituxan (rituximab) — Mechanism: CD20-targeting monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: Patients with certain nephrotic syndrome — Comparator: N/A — Results: Regulatory approval granted for additional dosage regimen.

AK117 — Mechanism: Anti-CD47 monoclonal antibody blocking 'don't eat me' signal — Phase: 2 — Population: Previously untreated AML ineligible for intensive chemotherapy — Comparator: Placebo + azacitidine/venetoclax — Endpoints/Results: 80.0% ORR, 56.7% CRc, 46.7% MRD-negative CRc, median OS not reached vs 8.3 months.

Mabion S.A. / Oddifact SAS — Strategic collaboration — MabionCD20 — Letter of Intent signed to evaluate rare disease indications using Oddifact's S.A.V.E. AI platform; aims for partnership and registration of orphan drug program.

Connect Biopharma / Simcere Pharmaceutical — Rademikibart licensing — Greater China — Exclusive license granted; Connect eligible for up to $110M in development, regulatory, and commercial milestones plus low double-digit tiered royalties on net sales.

Biogen / RayThera — Acquisition — Immunology pipeline — $1B total value (undisclosed upfront + clinical/regulatory milestones) for portfolio of anti-inflammatory candidates; RayThera founded 2023, pipeline details undisclosed.

MoonLake Immunotherapeutics — BLA submission strategy — sonelokimab — Final pre-BLA meeting completed with FDA; submission planned end of September 2026; Priority Review designation decision expected by end of November 2026.
Sanofi — Regulatory expansion — Sarclisa (isatuximab) — Subcutaneous formulation approved in Japan for multiple myeloma patients.
